_comment: Sitewide image inventory with descriptive alt text. Last updated: 2026-04-04. All images on the website must have a descriptive alt attribute matching the entry here. Content writers: see README.md § Image Alt Text Guidelines.
_note: For purely decorative images use alt: '' (empty string). For all informational images use a concise, descriptive phrase that conveys the image content to someone who cannot see it.
